heading: Today
text: Rain or a little sleet south ending. Some breaks of sun north. Showers in NY late.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Showers, mixed with sleet and freezing rain east.

heading: Friday
text: Chance of showers, maybe some early mix east of the Greens.

heading: Saturday
temperature: Upper 40s to mid 50s north, upper 50s to mid 60s south
